description: Style NoteTonga delivers a great range of choices for the young fashionable woman. Colour-pops and unique designs add a playful edge to day-wear. Sweet hues and romantic trends bring out the best in you. So grab your favourite piece today before they run out!Product DetailsCrafted in fine fabric and featuring a scoop neckline, this black top has sleeveless styling, designed with a handkerchief hem and a racer backMaterial and Care75% rayon, 20% polyester and 5% spandex with a lining of 100% cottonHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
